name: Taxis and Uber
description: Getting where you need to go by taxi

phrases.context: The most important taxi phrase — follow with your destination
Naming Central as your destination — swap for any HK district
Tell the driver to pull over — they'll stop as soon as it's safe

phrases.english: Drop me off on the right up ahead
phrases.context: Guide the driver to a specific spot to stop
Direct the driver — use if they're about to miss a turn
Direct the driver to turn left

phrases.english: No need to cross the harbour
phrases.context: Tell the driver not to take the tunnel — avoids extra tolls
Tell the driver to go through the tunnel

phrases.english: Could you turn on the AC?
phrases.context: HK taxis can be hot — politely ask for the air con
Ask for the AC to be turned up
Use when you're running late — drivers will do their best
Ask the fare before paying
Tell the driver to keep the change — rounding up is the norm

phrases.romanization: Ho² m⁴ ho² ji³ jung⁶ kaat¹?
phrases.jyutping: ho2 m4 ho2 ji3 jung6 kaat1
phrases.context: Most HK taxis are cash only — ask to be safe
Check if the driver started the meter — especially important at night
Say this as you arrive — a polite farewell to the driver
Ask the driver to wait while you run a quick errand
Alternative way to state your destination

phrases.english: Drop me off at that building
phrases.context: Point out a specific building as your drop-off
Tell the driver to go straight ahead

dialogueScenes.title: Taking a taxi to Causeway Bay
dialogueScenes.description: You hail a taxi and give directions

turns.speaker: user
turns.jyutping: heoi3 tung4 lo4 waan1, m4 goi1.
turns.romanization: Heoi³ tung⁴ lo⁴ waan¹, m⁴ goi¹.
turns.english: To Causeway Bay please.

turns.speaker: other
turns.jyutping: hou2. heoi3 bin1 dou6 gaa3?
turns.romanization: Hou². Heoi³ bin¹ dou⁶ gaa³?
turns.english: Sure. Where exactly?

turns.speaker: user
turns.jyutping: zik6 haang4, cin4 min6 zyun3 jau6.
turns.romanization: Zik⁶ haang⁴, cin⁴ min⁶ zyun³ jau⁶.
turns.english: Go straight, then turn right up ahead.

turns.speaker: other
turns.jyutping: lok6 seoi6 dou6 ding6 m4 lok6?
turns.romanization: Lok⁶ seoi⁶ dou⁶ ding⁶ m⁴ lok⁶?
turns.english: Tunnel or not?

turns.speaker: user
turns.jyutping: m4 sai2 gwo3 hoi2, m4 goi1.
turns.romanization: M⁴ sai² gwo³ hoi², m⁴ goi¹.
turns.english: No tunnel needed, thanks.

turns.speaker: other
turns.jyutping: hou2, dou3 laa3.
turns.romanization: Hou², dou³ laa³.
turns.english: Okay, we're here.

turns.speaker: user
turns.jyutping: do1 ze6. m4 sai2 zaau2.
turns.romanization: Do¹ ze⁶. M⁴ sai² zaau².
turns.english: Thank you. Keep the change.

dialogueScenes.title: Taxi in the rain — running late
dialogueScenes.description: You're late and need the driver to hurry

turns.speaker: user
turns.chinese: 去尖沙咀，唔該。快啲，我遲到喇。
turns.jyutping: heoi3 zim1 saa1 zeoi2, m4 goi1. faai3 di1, ngo5 ci4 dou3 laa3.
turns.romanization: Heoi³ zim¹ saa¹ zeoi², m⁴ goi¹. Faai³ di¹, ngo⁵ ci⁴ dou³ laa³.
turns.english: To Tsim Sha Tsui please. Quickly — I'm late.

turns.speaker: other
turns.jyutping: hou2, ngo5 zeon6 faai3.
turns.romanization: Hou², ngo⁵ zeon⁶ faai³.
turns.english: Okay, I'll go as fast as I can.

turns.speaker: user
turns.jyutping: hoi1 haa5 laang5 hei3, m4 goi1.
turns.romanization: Hoi¹ haa⁵ laang⁵ hei³, m⁴ goi¹.
turns.english: Could you turn on the AC please?

turns.speaker: other
turns.jyutping: hou2, dou3 laa3, hai6 m4 hai6 ni1 dou6 lok6?
turns.romanization: Hou², dou³ laa³, hai⁶ m⁴ hai⁶ ni¹ dou⁶ lok⁶?
turns.english: Okay, we're here — is this where you're getting off?

turns.speaker: user
turns.jyutping: hai6, ni1 dou6 lok6. do1 ze6 saai3!
turns.romanization: Hai⁶, ni¹ dou⁶ lok⁶. Do¹ ze⁶ saai³!
turns.english: Yes, here. Thank you so much!

name: MTR and Buses
description: Navigating Hong Kong's world-class public transport

phrases.context: Ask which MTR line to take for your destination

phrases.english: Do I need to change lines?
phrases.context: Ask if you need to transfer to get to your destination
Ask how many stops until your destination
HK MTR exits are labeled A, B, C etc — knowing the right one saves time
The exit letter you need — MTR exits are labeled A1, A2, B, C etc.
Ask on a train or bus when you're unsure of your stop

phrases.romanization: Ni¹ gaa³ hai⁶ m⁴ hai⁶ heoi³ ... ge³?
phrases.jyutping: ni1 gaa3 hai6 m4 hai6 heoi3 ... ge3
phrases.context: Check you're getting on the right bus before boarding

phrases.english: Please tell me when to get off
phrases.context: Ask a nearby passenger to alert you at your stop — people are very helpful

phrases.romanization: Ni¹ go³ hai⁶ m⁴ hai⁶ ... zaam⁶?
phrases.jyutping: ni1 go3 hai6 m4 hai6 ... zaam6
phrases.context: Confirm you're at the right stop
Ask when the next train or bus is coming

words.english: next service / next bus or train

phrases.context: Ask about the bus or minibus fare

phrases.romanization: Ho² m⁴ ho² ji³ jung⁶ baat³ daat⁶ tung¹?
phrases.jyutping: ho2 m4 ho2 ji3 jung6 baat3 daat6 tung1
phrases.english: Can I use my Octopus card?
phrases.context: Octopus works on MTR, most buses, trams, and ferries

phrases.romanization: Fei¹ gaau¹ zaam⁶ heoi³ bin¹ dou⁶ daap³?
phrases.jyutping: fei1 gaau1 zaam6 heoi3 bin1 dou6 daap3
phrases.english: Where do I get the Airport Express?
phrases.context: Ask for the Airport Express train location

phrases.romanization: Heoi³ dei⁶ tit³ zaam⁶ dim² haang⁴?
phrases.jyutping: heoi3 dei6 tit3 zaam6 dim2 haang4
phrases.english: How do I get to the MTR station?
phrases.context: Ask someone nearby how to walk to the MTR

words.english: how to walk / how to get

phrases.context: Tell someone you've already tapped your Octopus card

dialogueScenes.title: Asking for directions on the MTR
dialogueScenes.description: You're lost in an MTR station and need help

turns.speaker: user
turns.chinese: 唔該，去銅鑼灣係邊條線？
turns.jyutping: m4 goi1, heoi3 tung4 lo4 waan1 hai6 bin1 tiu4 sin3?
turns.romanization: M⁴ goi¹, heoi³ tung⁴ lo⁴ waan¹ hai⁶ bin¹ tiu⁴ sin³?
turns.english: Excuse me, which line goes to Causeway Bay?

turns.speaker: other
turns.jyutping: daap3 gong2 dou2 sin3, m4 sai2 zyun3 sin3.
turns.romanization: Daap³ gong² dou² sin³, m⁴ sai² zyun³ sin³.
turns.english: Take the Island Line — no transfers needed.

turns.speaker: user
turns.jyutping: gei2 do1 go3 zaam6?
turns.romanization: Gei² do¹ go³ zaam⁶?
turns.english: How many stops?

turns.speaker: other
turns.jyutping: loeng5 go3 zaam6. ceot1 A ceot1 hau2.
turns.romanization: Loeng⁵ go³ zaam⁶. Ceot¹ A ceot¹ hau².
turns.english: Two stops. Take Exit A.

turns.speaker: user
turns.jyutping: A ceot1 hau2, ming4 baak6. do1 ze6!
turns.romanization: A ceot¹ hau², ming⁴ baak⁶. Do¹ ze⁶!
turns.english: Exit A, got it. Thank you!

dialogueScenes.title: Getting on the right bus
dialogueScenes.description: You're not sure if this bus goes where you need

turns.speaker: user
turns.jyutping: ni1 gaa3 hai6 m4 hai6 heoi3 cek3 zyu6 gaa3?
turns.romanization: Ni¹ gaa³ hai⁶ m⁴ hai⁶ heoi³ cek³ zyu⁶ gaa³?
turns.english: Does this bus go to Stanley?

turns.speaker: other
turns.jyutping: hai6 aa3, daan6 hai6 jiu3 dang2 zan6.
turns.romanization: Hai⁶ aa³, daan⁶ hai⁶ jiu³ dang² zan⁶.
turns.english: Yes, but you need to wait a bit.

turns.speaker: user
turns.jyutping: m4 goi1 giu3 ngo5 lok6, hou2 maa3?
turns.romanization: M⁴ goi¹ giu³ ngo⁵ lok⁶, hou² maa³?
turns.english: Please let me know when to get off, okay?

turns.speaker: other
turns.jyutping: hou2, ngo5 giu3 nei5.
turns.romanization: Hou², ngo⁵ giu³ nei⁵.
turns.english: Sure, I'll let you know.

name: Shopping
description: Sizes, colours, trying on, and getting a deal

phrases.context: Point at any item and ask the price

phrases.english: Do you have a bigger size?
phrases.context: Ask for a larger size — 大碼 (large), 細碼 (small), 中碼 (medium)

phrases.english: Do you have a smaller size?
phrases.context: Ask for a smaller size

phrases.romanization: Ho² m⁴ ho² ji³ si³ san¹?
phrases.jyutping: ho2 m4 ho2 ji3 si3 san1
phrases.context: Ask to use the fitting room

phrases.romanization: Si³ san¹ sat¹ hai⁶ bin¹ dou⁶?
phrases.jyutping: si3 san1 sat1 hai6 bin1 dou6
phrases.context: Ask for directions to the changing rooms

phrases.romanization: Jau⁵ mou⁵ ke⁴ taa¹ ngaan⁴ sik¹?
phrases.jyutping: jau5 mou5 ke4 taa1 ngaan4 sik1
phrases.english: Do you have this in other colours?
phrases.context: Ask if the item comes in different colours

phrases.english: Do you have this in black?
phrases.context: Ask for a specific colour — swap 黑色 for 白色 (white), 紅色 (red), 藍色 (blue)
Ask about any sale or discount — 打八折 means 20% off (paying 8/10)
Negotiate at market stalls and smaller independent shops

phrases.romanization: Maai⁵ loeng⁵ gin⁶ jau⁵ mou⁵ jau¹ wai⁶?
phrases.jyutping: maai5 loeng5 gin6 jau5 mou5 jau1 wai6
phrases.english: Any deal if I buy two?
phrases.context: Ask for a bundle discount

phrases.romanization: Ho² m⁴ ho² ji³ teoi³ fun²?
phrases.jyutping: ho2 m4 ho2 ji3 teoi3 fun2
phrases.context: Ask about the refund policy
Ask to exchange an item for a different size or colour
Tell them you want to buy this item
Politely decline after looking — staff won't be offended
Tell staff you're just looking — they'll give you space
Ask for a receipt — useful for returns and expense claims

words.english: can I have / do you have

phrases.context: Ask for a shopping bag — some shops charge for them now
Decline the bag — environmentally friendly and saves the plastic bag levy

phrases.romanization: Ni¹ gin⁶ ngaam¹ m⁴ ngaam¹ maa⁵?
phrases.jyutping: ni1 gin6 ngaam1 m4 ngaam1 maa5
phrases.context: Ask a staff member to check the size for you
Ask the shop to set aside an item while you think about it
Ask if there are new arrivals — useful in fashion or electronics shops
Ask about the fabric or material of an item

phrases.romanization: Baau¹ zong¹ hou² di¹, sung³ jan⁴ ge³
phrases.jyutping: baau1 zong1 hou2 di1, sung3 jan4 ge3
phrases.english: Please wrap it nicely — it's a gift
phrases.context: Ask for gift wrapping

words.english: it's a gift / giving to someone

phrases.romanization: Ni¹ go³ jau⁵ mou⁵ haa⁴ ci¹?
phrases.jyutping: ni1 go3 jau5 mou5 haa4 ci1
phrases.english: Is there any defect on this?
phrases.context: Check for damage before buying, especially at markets
Ask to see a specific item — follow with what you want to see

dialogueScenes.title: Trying on clothes
dialogueScenes.description: You want to try on a shirt at a market stall

turns.speaker: user
turns.jyutping: ni1 gin6 gei2 do1 cin2?
turns.romanization: Ni¹ gin⁶ gei² do¹ cin²?
turns.english: How much is this?

turns.speaker: other
turns.jyutping: jat1 baak3 ng5 sap6 man1.
turns.romanization: Jat¹ baak³ ng⁵ sap⁶ man¹.
turns.english: One hundred and fifty dollars.

turns.speaker: user
turns.jyutping: ho2 m4 ho2 ji3 si3 san1?
turns.romanization: Ho² m⁴ ho² ji³ si³ san¹?
turns.english: Can I try it on?

turns.speaker: other
turns.jyutping: dak1, jap6 heoi3 si3.
turns.romanization: Dak¹, jap⁶ heoi³ si³.
turns.english: Sure, go try it on.

turns.speaker: user
turns.jyutping: jau5 mou5 daai6 maa5? ni1 gin6 sai3 zo2 di1.
turns.romanization: Jau⁵ mou⁵ daai⁶ maa⁵? Ni¹ gin⁶ sai³ zo² di¹.
turns.english: Do you have a bigger size? This one's a bit small.

turns.speaker: other
turns.jyutping: jau5, dang2 ngo5 lo2.
turns.romanization: Jau⁵, dang² ngo⁵ lo².
turns.english: Yes, let me get it.

dialogueScenes.title: Asking for a discount
dialogueScenes.description: You want to buy a bag but think the price is high

turns.speaker: user
turns.chinese: 呢個太貴喇，平啲得唔得？
turns.jyutping: ni1 go3 taai3 gwai3 laa3, peng4 di1 dak1 m4 dak1?
turns.romanization: Ni¹ go³ taai³ gwai³ laa³, peng⁴ di¹ dak¹ m⁴ dak¹?
turns.english: This is too expensive — can you go cheaper?

turns.speaker: other
turns.jyutping: hai6 leng3 je5 lai4 gaa3, peng4 m4 dak1 gaa3.
turns.romanization: Hai⁶ leng³ je⁵ lai⁴ gaa³, peng⁴ m⁴ dak¹ gaa³.
turns.english: It's good quality — I can't go lower.

turns.speaker: user
turns.jyutping: maai5 loeng5 gin6 jau5 mou5 jau1 wai6?
turns.romanization: Maai⁵ loeng⁵ gin⁶ jau⁵ mou⁵ jau¹ wai⁶?
turns.english: Any deal if I buy two?

turns.speaker: other
turns.chinese: 買兩件打九折，二百七十蚊。
turns.jyutping: maai5 loeng5 gin6 daa2 gau2 zit3, ji6 baak3 cat1 sap6 man1.
turns.romanization: Maai⁵ loeng⁵ gin⁶ daa² gau² zit³, ji⁶ baak³ cat¹ sap⁶ man¹.
turns.english: Buy two and get 10% off — two hundred and seventy dollars.

turns.speaker: user
turns.jyutping: hou2, ngo5 jiu3 ni1 loeng5 go3.
turns.romanization: Hou², ngo⁵ jiu³ ni¹ loeng⁵ go³.
turns.english: Okay, I'll take these two.

name: Asking for Directions
description: Left, right, straight ahead, and nearby landmarks

phrases.english: Excuse me, how do I get to...?
phrases.context: Start any directions request with this — follow with your destination

words.english: how to get to / how to go

phrases.context: The most common direction — keep going straight ahead
Turn to the left
Turn to the right
The destination is in front of you
Ask the distance before deciding to walk or take transport

phrases.english: How long is it on foot?
phrases.context: Ask how many minutes to walk
Reassurance that something is close — a very useful thing to hear
Expect to hear this a lot — HK people often underestimate walking distance
Say this if someone asks you for directions you can't give
Point in the direction of the destination
A landmark-based direction — very common in HK

words.english: then it is / you'll find it

dialogueScenes.title: Finding a pharmacy
dialogueScenes.description: You're looking for a pharmacy on a busy street

turns.speaker: user
turns.jyutping: m4 goi1, fu6 gan6 jau5 mou5 joek6 fong4?
turns.romanization: M⁴ goi¹, fu⁶ gan⁶ jau⁵ mou⁵ joek⁶ fong⁴?
turns.english: Excuse me, is there a pharmacy nearby?

turns.speaker: other
turns.chinese: 有，喺前面轉左，唔係好遠。
turns.jyutping: jau5, hai6 cin4 min6 zyun3 zo2, m4 hai6 hou2 jyun5.
turns.romanization: Jau⁵, hai⁶ cin⁴ min⁶ zyun³ zo², m⁴ hai⁶ hou² jyun⁵.
turns.english: Yes — go straight, turn left, it's not far.

turns.speaker: user
turns.jyutping: haang4 lou6 gei2 noi6?
turns.romanization: Haang⁴ lou⁶ gei² noi⁶?
turns.english: How long on foot?

turns.speaker: other
turns.jyutping: loeng5 saam1 fan1 jung1 ze1.
turns.romanization: Loeng⁵ saam¹ fan¹ jung¹ ze¹.
turns.english: Just two or three minutes.

turns.speaker: user
turns.jyutping: ming4 baak6, zik6 haang4 zyun3 zo2. do1 ze6!
turns.romanization: Ming⁴ baak⁶, zik⁶ haang⁴ zyun³ zo². Do¹ ze⁶!
turns.english: Got it — straight then turn left. Thanks!

dialogueScenes.title: Finding the MTR station
dialogueScenes.description: You're lost and need to find the nearest MTR

turns.speaker: user
turns.jyutping: m4 goi1, heoi3 dei6 tit3 zaam6 dim2 haang4?
turns.romanization: M⁴ goi¹, heoi³ dei⁶ tit³ zaam⁶ dim² haang⁴?

turns.speaker: other
turns.chinese: 直行，過咗那個超市就係。
turns.jyutping: zik6 haang4, gwo3 zo2 go2 go3 ciu1 si5 zau6 hai6.
turns.romanization: Zik⁶ haang⁴, gwo³ zo² go² go³ ciu¹ si⁵ zau⁶ hai⁶.
turns.english: Go straight — just past that supermarket you'll see it.

turns.speaker: user
turns.jyutping: gei2 jyun5?
turns.romanization: Gei² jyun⁵?

turns.speaker: other
turns.jyutping: hai6 fu6 gan6 gaa3, haang4 ng5 fan1 jung1.
turns.romanization: Hai⁶ fu⁶ gan⁶ gaa³, haang⁴ ng⁵ fan¹ jung¹.

turns.speaker: user

turns.romanization: Do¹ ze⁶ saai³! Zik⁶ haang⁴ zau⁶ dou³.
